name: Diapered Adventures [ABDL RPG]
description:
Going on an adventure? Have no DnD friends to play with? Wanting a team that can virtually support you through thick and thin? 

Look no further than being the captain of your very own team! Go questing, going through dungeons, destroy your enemies or even your allies, and even do the most questionable things you can imagine! 

We have Laura the Wolf Ranger, Eva the Human Sorceress and Jim the Brave Knight! Have fun!
